steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the choice that best describes how DLS cures 3D objects — the mechanism, not a definition of the technology.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Omits the driving mechanism (UV light projecting into resin), leaving the process incomplete. ✗
  • Choice B: Confuses the dead zone's role and incorrectly states that curing finishes there rather than in the oven. ✗
  • Choice C — 'UV light projects into liquid resin, curing objects layer by layer, then final baking': Directly and accurately describes the mechanism step by step. ✓
  • Choice D: Opens with a definition rather than the process and uses awkward construction that dilutes the explanation. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
